# Cognitive Overlay Design — Consolidated Super Report v12

## Core claim

The project is now organized around proof of mechanisms, not belief in a single caption style.

The strongest stack is:

> **SCC + structured signaling + gaze-safe placement + visual-load adaptation + dual-layer captions.**

BCC is retained as a named method, but it must prove that bionic concept anchors add value beyond SCC.

## Archive contents

- 178 method cards.
- 30 detailed experiment protocols.
- Source index.
- Method registry.
- Condition registry.
- Production workflow.
- ASOE spec.
- Roadmap.
- Data schemas.
- Preregistration template.
- Legacy artifacts.

## First experiment sequence

1. EXP-001: Core Overlay Superiority Trial.
2. EXP-002: SCC vs BCC Ablation.
3. EXP-013: Operator-First Syntax Microphrase Trial.
4. EXP-014: Compression Ratio Ladder.
5. EXP-015: Highlight/Bionic Dose Response.

## Decision gates

- If SCC fails against FTO: compression rules are too aggressive or wrong.
- If BCC fails against SCC: bionic anchors become optional styling.
- If BCC+ beats BCC: placement/load/timing are the real advantage.
- If heavy bionic beats BCC: anchor theory or metric design is wrong.
- If watch time improves but recall drops: reject for learning/clarity use.

## Main law

> Engineer the video so the viewer needs fewer fixations to understand more.
